creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission and I'm sorry it took me so long to review this one.  Here are some comments:

 - you don't need a DOCS option to install a README file.  In fact, I don't see
   how the README is useful at all, as it mostly contains information already
   included in the ryzenadj binary or information pertaining the installation of
   the software.
 - instead, consider installing the examples shipped with the project
 - please extend pkg-descr to at least three lines.  The file should tell the
   user why he or she might want to install the port and what features it has.
 - GH_PROJECT defaults to PORTNAME and needs not be set explicitly in this case
 - please update the port to the most recent version (0.16.0)

Port is fine otherwise and with these issues addressed, it can be committed quickly.
